form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Fr5) over 2150m after showing early speed and racing wide at this track, beaten 8 m by Insider Trading (2:36.70) in NR up to 50 on April 1 at $2.90. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 8 m as favourite (Sr2) at Birchip (2:41.20) beating Outback Queenie in NR up to 45 on March 8 at $2.60 at the bell was 4th-2.8. Not here.

form.formComment: Having her second run back from a spell. Solid effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr6) over 1690m at Kilmore beaten 4.5 m by Caties Son (2:03.40) in 0-3 WINs on April 2 at $3.50. Fitter and draws well so expected to feature.

form.formComment: Hard to fault of late. Last start by a nose as favourite when quickly away, (Fr5) at Cranbourne (1:58.80) beating The Villain in NR 47 to 52 on March 29 at $1.75 at the bell was leading 1.4. Racing well and must be considered.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running during the early stages of the run to the finish.
Shied passing the 100m and became unbalanced momentarily.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at Shepparton over 1690m NR 50 to 55 on March 8. Last time out 4th (Fr5) over 2080m at Cranbourne was 6th-13 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Pistol Pearce (2:33.80) in NR 53 to 58 on March 29 at $4.20. Can play a role.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh after showing early speed, behind Sea Fury at Shepparton over 2190m in a NR up to 65 on March 8 at $5.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.4 m finishing second behind With In Reason at Shepparton over 1690m in a NR 55 to 60 on March 17 at $14. Another good showing would not surprise.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground from the 300m to be beaten 27m into 7th placing.
Locked wheels with Ernielovenboy rounding the final turn.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by 6 m as favourite (Fr3) at Terang (2:37.40) beating Nosweetsforyou in NR 56 to 64 on March 27 at $1.06. Two runs back ran on from midfield and won by 20 m (Sr1) at Kilmore (2:41.00) beating Quatro Moth in NR 52 to 56 on March 12 at $4.20 at the bell was leading 2.3. Promising and can maintain the perfect record.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Engaged in a jostle with Weona Our Rights momentarily approaching the 1200m.

form.formComment: Well-beaten 11 days ago at Melton over 2240m, before that 6th (Sr3) over 2240m at Melton, beaten 24 m by Fire Marshall (2:40.10) in 0W/15 0K stake on March 21 at $101. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the final stages to finish in 11th position, beaten 45.0m.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr4) over 2240m after showing early speed and racing wide at Melton, at the bell was leading 2.49 beaten 4.5 m by Alwaysbealady (2:42.20) in NR 62 to 71 on March 28 at $7. At the run before was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr4) over 2240m at Melton, beaten 6 m by Good Tobe Locksley (2:44.20) in NR 60 to 69 on March 14 at $3.60. Place best.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 4.5 m third behind Tara Victory at Melton over 1720m 0W/15 0K stake last start. Before that was beaten a head third again at Melton same class on March 14. Close to a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 4.5 m third behind Tara Victory at Melton over 1720m 0W/15 0K stake last start. Before that was beaten a head third again at Melton same class on March 14. Close to a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered between the 600m and the 450m when trailing the tiring Wicked Mitzi.

form.formComment: Backs up 4 days after failing to impress last start; was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr5) over 2240m after being wide early at Melton, beaten 30 m by Zanda Man (2:43.60) in 0W/15 0K stake on April 4 at $16. Showed ability the race before when he won by 3 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at Riverina Paceway (2:03.90) beating Keayang Jigsaw in NR up to 65 on March 20 at $2.50 at the bell was leading 0.6. With even luck could be in the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in when placed under pressure on the entry to the home straight.
Over raced throughout the early and middle stages of the race.
